title: Dora, Explore & Play Rainforest Casita Playset, Dora and Boots Figures, Doll's house Furniture, Bilingual Phrases, Kids Toys for Girls and Boys Ages 3 and Up
availability_text: This item will be released on August 1, 2025.
features: Large, Multi-Area Playset: At 91.4-cm wide, the Casita features multiple indoor and outdoor areas, with detailed rooms to decorate using doll's house accessories and furniture like a sofa, a bathtub and more
Outdoor Adventures: Features interactive elements like a swinging vine, treetop playground, wobbly bridge, see-saw monkey bars, magic slide, dancing flower, and a pop-out Swiper for surprise play

Series-Inspired Details and Sound Fx: Includes Dora and Boots figures, with Dora’s iconic Backpack, vibrant design and styling—plus sound fx and phrases activated by a foot pedal in the Casita’s living room
Discover and Collect: Dora the explorer toys are pre-school toys for kids, which include dolls, doll's house accessories, pretend play toys and musical toys, like a toy microphone and kids guitar toy
Includes: 1 Playset, 2 Figures, 6 Doll's house Furniture pieces, 1 Collector Card
Toddler Learning Gifts for Kids: These learning toys give the gift of magical creativity, on any occasion, with a gift set of toys for girls, doll clothes, stuffed animals, toy figures and playsets
description: Bring the world of Dora to life, with the Explore and Play Rainforest Casita Playset. Spanning 91.4-cm wide, this casita offers endless fun, with rooms to decorate, and outdoor adventures like swinging, sliding, and climbing. Includes Dora and Boots figures, plus Dora’s iconic sidekick—Backpack. Whether its dancing on the spinning floor or a surprise visit from Swiper, this playset encourages imaginative play. Outside, the figures can swing on the "Jungle Vine," cross the "Wobbly Bridge," and much more. Inside, explore multiple play areas, decorate with doll house furniture and activate sounds and bilingual phrases with the button in the living room. Step into the world of Dora, with toddler toys that will make magical birthday and festive gifts for girls and boys that love pretend play toys, like dolls and accessories and doll's house furniture. For even more thrilling adventures with Dora the explorer, build your very own “World of Dora” with the Rainforest Casita doll house—a casa de munecas that looks just like Dora’s house in the show, and gift packs with lovable action figures and must-have accessories, or interactive dolls, super-cute plushies and pretend play musical instruments that’ll have fans rocking out like the big kids. (each sold separately)
